MyKHAS

Switch to English Website

The main aims of the General Public Law Department are to provide students with comprehension of the historical development process of relations between individuals and the state and show the dimension to which these relations reach in modern times. The courses run by the General Public Law Department include the concepts of the formation and development of the state and the relations between society, state, and law.

Courses

LAW 331 Politics and Law
